summary: Late check-in around 1am for the guest in room 210; deposit taken, no issues.
Maintenance diagnosed room 112's aircon as a failed compressor needing an ordered part; room stays out of order, original guest still in 115.
The 2nd-floor corridor leak near room 215 worsened overnight; a bucket was placed, building management was reached but no one attended before shift end. Still not fixed.
Relief staff charged room 312's one-night no-show fee per the booking terms and considers the matter settled.
An upper-floor guest reported around 3am that the wifi kept dropping; the room could not be identified and the caller did not follow up.
Room 309's deposit issue carried over from Tuesday is still unsettled; no deposit on file.
Room 205 found with door ajar, bed not slept in and no luggage, although the system shows the guest in-house; needs reconciliation before further billing.
Guest in room 208 reports the in-room safe will not open with their passport and cash locked inside; they check out early for a flight and need an urgent locksmith or safe technician.
